change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
7 meetings organize and 105 participants from  MOHP, SWC, DHO, VDC and other stakeholders

4 pre-intervention visits in target  VDCs/HFs

2 MOU/TOR MoUs with concerned authority

4 Health facilities constructed each 1 per VDC. A total 28630 community people directly benefited

Essential medical equipments supplied in 4 Health facilities, each 1 per VDC

4 Health facilities, each 1 per VDC resumed services

4  community gender friendly toilets  at least 1 per VDC constructed and 28630  community people directly benefited

4 orientation for 128 health staff  conducted

6600 community people in 4 VDCs

40 filters for HF and FCHVs

800 adolescent 200 in each VDC

 

Radio broadcasting-3 month

Posters, Pamphlets, Pictorial Booklets-5000

8 street theatres performed and 400 community people benefited

5   WASH days-Celebration in targeted VDCs. 750 community people benefited

4 event and 60 HFOMC member, 15 per facility

20 times 360 community people trained

2 event for 25 health workers trained on MHPSS

12 event for 240 non prescribers trained on MHPSS

32  counselling  session for 640 students  conducted at schools

16  counselling sessions for 240 participants conducted in communities

 

World Mental Health Day celebration-1

5000 IEC materials developed and distributed

4 street theatres performed 200 community people benefited

4 event and 30 health workers trained on DRR

4 event 60 HFOMCs member oriented

4 health facilities with DRR equipments in place

6 times joint monitoring and supportive supervision conducted

20 times central monitoring visits
